metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_1793
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Consistent with their direct physical association, stonin 2 and synaptotagmin 1 were colocalized at synapses in cultured rat cortical neurons (Figure 1B). The presynaptic distribution of stonin 2 at synaptotagmin 1-immunopositive sites was even more apparent in primary neurons transfected with EGFP-stonin 2.. Experimental description: Legend to figure 1, "Consistent with their direct physical association, stonin 2 and synaptotagmin 1 were colocalized at synapses in cultured rat cortical neurons (Figure 1B)".

17/11/2017 Pim
- The species of the stonin 2 protein is not explicitly stated in the paper. Authors were contacted (haucke@fmp-berlin.de, dd. 17/11/2017). Authors replied:

Dear Pim,

In the study you refer to we used human Stonin 2 cDNA. Sorry for this omission.

Sincerely,
Volker

- Annotation to rat was made for the endogenous protein addressed by the antibody.
